title: Team Member Recognition
excerpt: I would love to have the ability to recognize team members for a job well done without just @ them. It could be a board template for recognition where all previous and future recognitions are housed. I’d love cute and fu…

posts.author: knaylor (Kaitlin Naylor)
posts.cookedHtml: I would love to have the ability to recognize team members for a job well done without just @ them. It could be a board template for recognition where all previous and future recognitions are housed. I’d love cute and fun graphics, the ability to give team members “stars” or some sort of pin for a job well done that is visible to everyone else.

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @knaylor ,
You might be interested in this app. It seems to do what you are looking for

posts.author: DanielMartin (DanielMartin)
posts.cookedHtml: You can try ecards or recognition softwares. both works well.
